reports.title: Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban
Do your own writing
Learn Claude Code by doing, not reading
Turning a MacBook into a touchscreen with $1 of hardware (2018)
How to turn anything into a router
Agents of Chaos
Bird brains (2023)
Android Developer Verification
Researchers find 3,500-year-old loom that reveals textile revolution
Cherri – programming language that compiles to an Apple Shortuct
AI & I by Every: Building Is the Easy Part Now | Mike Krieger on What AI Changed
reports.summary: Instagram联合创始人兼Anthropic产品负责人Mike Krieger分享了AI产品开发的洞察。他指出当前模型擅长添加功能，但不太擅长决定删除什么。Vibe coding很有趣但容易过度设计产品，导致复杂难用。他强调了'agent native'产品设计理念的重要性——Agent应该能够像用户一样使用应用的任何功能。

reports.title: Claude (claudeai): Computer use is now in Claude Code
reports.summary: Claude Code现已支持Computer use功能，Agent可以直接打开应用、点击UI并测试构建的内容。目前在Pro和Max计划的Research Preview中可用。
